no: Romantic Encounters BG2 Check the readme carefully and choose the components and versions you would want. Half of it it's about people doing the naughty, be sure about what you want here. You’ve been warned.Implicitly, there’s also paid sex, at least in BG1!Generally, install Romantic Encounters for BG1 & BG2 before most mods that add NPCs. More specifically…Install Framed after BG1 Romantic Encounters.Install Romantic Encounters for BG1 after EndlessBG1 and Jarl’s Adventure Pack.
ic: Conceptual - Valygar Romance components clash with corthalaromantique and valygarfriendship, Blame the Moon references Cernd being a shapeshifter (odd with Totemic Cernd), Coran component clashes with coran (BG2)

conflicts.reason: RE's Coran encounter extends C6CORAN dialogue (vanilla Ch6 cameo). Coran NPC mod replaces C6CORAN entirely, making the extension point invalid

a: Kulyok, Ajnos, berelinde, Catseye, cmorgan, Domi, Evaine Dian, gertjanvh, jastey, magrat, Western Paladin, Aeryn, Cal Jones, Thimblerig
sum: Adds 54 optional romantic and social encounter scenes throughout BG2. Short vignettes adding flavor: tavern flirtations, chance meetings, and intimate moments.

co.n: Aerie, Anomen, Jaheira and Viconia React to Romantic Encounters
co.no: Aerie, Anomen, Jaheira, Viconia, Mazzy react to RE encounters. Can optionally end romances based on player choices. Safe with NPC mods using standard romance variables
co.tp2n: Aerie, Anomen, Jaheira and Viconia React to Romantic Encounters
